summary: On a synthetic SBM (300 nodes, 1770 edges, 3 planted communities) where node features alone are only weakly informative, a 2-layer GCN reaches 0.95 test accuracy versus 0.72 for a graph-blind MLP of identical shape - a 23-point lift from message passing over the graph structure.
data_source: synthetic SBM (N=300, C=3, p_in=0.08, p_out=0.02, snr=0.45)
